Launch App
THE PROTOCOL GENESIS

Algorithm
Over Authority.

We are a collective of cryptographers who realized that trusting humans with sensitive seed phrases guarantees ultimate failure.

I

Why we built this.

The year is 2026. Institutional capital has flooded the decentralized web. Billions of dollars in value are secured behind 24-word seed phrases written on steel plates.

Yet, what happens when the owner of those keys dies? They hire lawyers. They draft wills. They trust a third party to execute their final wishes. This introduces the very vulnerability the blockchain was designed to eliminate: Human Trust.

Immutable Infrastructure

The pillars of digital sovereignty.

Absolute Immutability

Once deployed to the Polygon blockchain, your will becomes a literal force of nature. It cannot be altered by states, attorneys, or even our own engineers.

Total Zero-Knowledge

Your data is encrypted locally. At no point in time does any centralized server possess the capability to decrypt the names of your beneficiaries.

Post-State Legal Resolution

The probate court system is a legacy API. By converting legal intent into deterministic code, we skip the court entirely.

DECENTRALIZED

Digital Will Protocol

Securing digital legacies for the decentralized future. Your assets, your rules.
